caption: A man with a mustache, wearing a white shirt and a maroon sleeveless vest, is seated inside a vehicle. He is speaking while facing toward the camera. An "ANI" microphone is positioned in front of him. The scene is framed by news graphics, including a red banner at the bottom with the white text "शपथ लेने के बाद नीतीश कुमार का बयान" and a timestamp of "10:04 PM." The screen features several small portrait photos of other men accompanied by titles such as "डिप्टी CM" (Deputy CM) and "मंत्री" (Minister), with names including "सबरात चौधरी," "विजय सिन्हा," "संतोष सुमन," and "सुमित कुमार." Across the frames, the man continues speaking from the same position, and while the news overlays remain largely consistent, the text at the very top of the screen changes, shifting from "कांग्रेस छट" in the first frame to other partially visible phrases in subsequent frames.
